markdown_content:
This page is the master index of all known projects, themes, and sub-themes.

It is used by the yos-memory-boot skill to initialize cross-session memory.


## Projects


### Ludivine

- Type: project
- Aliases: ludivine, Ludivine canon, ludivine project

### Ludivine Canon Architecture

- Type: subtheme (parent: Ludivine)
- Aliases: canon architecture, ludivine architecture, book structure

### Ludivine 108 Mapping

- Type: subtheme (parent: Ludivine)
- Aliases: 108 mapping, 108 structure, elemental mapping

### 7 Doors

- Type: subtheme (parent: Ludivine)
- Aliases: 7 doors, seven doors, 7 portes

### 7d LIFE

- Type: project
- Aliases: 7d life, 7D LIFE, Flower Coaching App, 7D coaching, flower coaching

### 7d LIFE Core Model

- Type: subtheme (parent: 7d LIFE)
- Aliases: core model, petal model, chakra model, 7D model

### 7d LIFE Weekly Tracker

- Type: subtheme (parent: 7d LIFE)
- Aliases: weekly tracker, WeeklyTracker, micro-actions tracker

### 7d LIFE Flower Visualization

- Type: subtheme (parent: 7d LIFE)
- Aliases: flower visualization, flower radar, petal visualization, 7D flower

### Initiatory / Transformational Architecture

- Type: theme
- Aliases: initiatory architecture, transformational architecture, staged evolution

## How to Use

When the user mentions any of the canonical names or aliases above,

search Notion for the corresponding Overview and Knowledge pages.

Load Overview first. Escalate to Knowledge if the question is structural or detailed.
